biography.text:
Born on November 26, 1999, Arsy Widianto’s musical talent was evident from an early age. In 2018, he officially debuted with the single “Nembak #MenyatakanCinta.” Since then, he has received numerous music awards, including the AMI Awards, Dahsyat Awards, and SCTV Awards.

With his distinctive and gentle voice, Arsy has consistently topped Indonesia’s music charts through collaborations with fellow artists. He is currently a member of the music group KIM, along with two close musician friends, creating music that is both youthful and uplifting.
